from manim import *

class MatrixTransformation(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        # Section 1 — Setup
        title = Text("2D Matrix Transformation", font_size=36, color=WHITE)
        title.to_edge(UP, buff=0.4)
        self.play(Write(title))

        grid = NumberPlane(x_range=[-5, 5, 1], y_range=[-5, 5, 1])
        self.play(Create(grid))

        # Section 2 — Original Grid
        self.wait(1)
        original_grid_label = Text("Original Grid", font_size=24, color=BLUE)
        original_grid_label.next_to(grid, DOWN, buff=0.5)
        self.play(Write(original_grid_label))
        self.wait(0.5)

        # Section 3 — Transformation Matrix
        transformation_matrix = MathTex(r"\begin{bmatrix} 2 & 0 \\ 0 & 3 \end{bmatrix}", font_size=36)
        transformation_matrix.to_edge(RIGHT, buff=1.5)
        self.play(Write(transformation_matrix))
        self.wait(1)

        # Section 4 — Transformed Grid
        transformed_grid = NumberPlane(x_range=[-5, 5, 1], y_range=[-5, 5, 1])
        transformed_grid.stretch(2, 0)
        transformed_grid.stretch(3, 1)
        self.play(Transform(grid, transformed_grid), run_time=2)
        self.wait(1.5)

        transformed_grid_label = Text("Transformed Grid", font_size=24, color=RED)
        transformed_grid_label.next_to(grid, DOWN, buff=0.5)
        self.play(Write(transformed_grid_label))
        self.wait(2)

        # Section 5 — Conclusion
        self.play(*[FadeOut(m) for m in self.mobjects])
